# AI Context for @json-express/kv-memory

An ephemeral, in-memory key-value store with TTL support.

## Setup
```typescript
import { KvMemory } from '@json-express/kv-memory';
kernel.registerKvStore(new KvMemory());
```

## AI Instruction
- Data is lost on restart. Do not use for long-term storage.
- Typically used by `plugin-identity` for storing short-lived password reset tokens or rate-limit counters.
